name: Maryam Al-Mansour
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم مريم 👋 لاحظنا أنك لم تحصلي على الدرجة المطلوبة في الاختبار الأخير (13/100)، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك تحسني النتائج 💪 عندك 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم، فلنشتغل مع بعض على المواضيع الصعبة؟
action: Call or message Maryam immediately today to schedule a one-on-one tutoring session covering the quiz content, since she has never been contacted and faces critical failure risk with only 6 days to the next assessment.
reasoning: Maryam is in critical risk (100/100 score) with a severe quiz failure (13/100) and has never had facilitator contact despite perfect attendance, indicating she needs immediate personalized intervention. With only 6 days until the next quiz, urgent direct engagement is essential to prevent dropout and help her recover academically.
